title: Yield and return should not be used outside functions
description: Avoid using yield and return statements outside of function definitions. This rule aims to prevent unintended behavior and ensure proper function-oriented programming.
message: Yield or return statement found outside a function.
recommendation: Refactor the code to define a function.
why_is_this_an_issue: Yield and return statements are used to control the execution of a generator or a coroutine. When used outside functions, they can lead to unintended behavior, making the code harder to understand and maintain.
how_to_fix: Refactor the code to define a function and move the yield or return statements inside the function.
